values.value:
Repstor Limited

Scottish Provident Building 7 Donegall Square West

Belfast, BT1 6JH

United Kingdom

By Wire Transfer & ACH Account Name: REPSTOR LIMITED Account Number: 73350010 Account Currency: GBP IBAN: GB65BOFA16505073350010 Branch Swift Address: BOFAGB22 Sort Code: High Value (CHAPS): 165050 / Low Value (BACS): 301635
Bank Address: Bank of America, N.A., London branch 2 King Edward Street London EC1A 1HQ United Kingdom
Payments in GBP can be processed via wire or ACH. Payments in currencies other than GBP must be submitted via wire transfer.
For any queries, please email: ar@intapp.com
